footer.description: Academic biblical study with rigor. Koine Greek, Biblical Hebrew, Systematic Theology, Exegesis and Artificial Intelligence — all integrated in a complete platform.

landing.heroDescription: Scripture as the sole infallible rule of faith and practice — studied with academic rigor and tools that serve the sacred text.
landing.heroKeywords: Koine Greek · Biblical Hebrew · Systematic Theology · History · Geography · Specialized AI
landing.resourcesTitle: Everything you need to study the Word
landing.ctaDescription: Access all tools for free. Study the Bible with the rigor it deserves.

solaScriptura.desc: Founded on Scripture as the supreme authority of faith and practice

exegesis.title: Biblical Exegesis
exegesis.description: Automatic exegesis tool with contextual, grammatical and theological analysis of the Scriptures.

theology.title: Systematic Theology
theology.description: Fundamental doctrines of biblical Christian faith
theology.reformedDesc: Sola Gratia, Sola Fide, Sola Scriptura, Solus Christus, Soli Deo Gloria. God's sovereignty in salvation.
theology.arminianDesc: Human freedom, resistible grace, conditional foreknowledge. Emphasis on human responsibility.
theology.baptistDesc: Scripture authority, personal regeneration, credobaptism, church/state separation.

history.title: Biblical History
history.description: Historical, cultural and geographical context — travel through biblical times
history.timelineDescription: Chronological approximation of the main events of the Scriptures
history.geographyDesc: The land of Israel, the Fertile Crescent and trade routes connect biblical events. The Jordan, the Mediterranean and the desert are central settings.
history.cultureDesc: Tribal, pastoral and agricultural society. The family and the clan are the social base. Honor, hospitality and covenant are fundamental values.
history.empiresDesc: Egypt, Assyria, Babylon, Persia, Greece and Rome dominated Israel in different periods, shaping its political and religious context.

patriarchal.title: Patriarchal Period
patriarchal.desc: Abraham, Isaac, Jacob and Joseph. The formation of God's people.

law.title: Period of the Law
law.desc: Exodus, Sinai, the promised land and the judges.

kings.title: Period of the Kings
kings.desc: Unified monarchy, divided kingdoms and prophets.

exile.title: Exile Period
exile.desc: Destruction of Jerusalem, captivity in Babylon and return.

intertestamentary.title: Intertestamentary Period
intertestamentary.desc: Persian, Greek and Roman rule. Formation of Judaism.

christ.title: Life of Christ
christ.desc: Birth, ministry, crucifixion and resurrection of Jesus.

earlyChurch.title: Early Church
earlyChurch.desc: Expansion of the gospel, epistles and canon formation.

characters.title: Biblical Characters
characters.description: Biographies, name meanings and contributions to the history of salvation
characters.clickToStudy: Click to study more about this character
characters.trySearch: Try searching for another name or filter

chronology.title: Biblical Chronology
chronology.description: Timeline from creation to the early church — a journey through divine history

ai.title: Biblical Assistant
ai.description: AI specialized in academic biblical studies
ai.askQuestion: Ask a question about the Scriptures
ai.error: Sorry, an error occurred while processing your question. Please try again.
